2014 public art

Are You?

Vinyl stickers on mirrors in the public areas of the Royal Beach hotel, Tel Aviv. Part of the group exhibition “HeLa, Forms of Human Existence” (curator: Daniel Landau), HaYarkon 19 center for Art, Culture and Education, Tel Aviv
